package.name: franka_softhand_handeye
package.description: Hand-eye (eye-to-hand) calibration setup for Franka Panda + qbSoftHand with an Intel RealSense D435i mounted at a fixed pose observing the robot. Provides URDF with the camera attached to world, a launch that brings up Franka + RealSense + MoveIt with the moveit_calibration RViz plugin.
package.author: Do Won Park
